prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e3fe1151`.
codex_response:
Implemented `e3fe1151` in [task_e3fe1151](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e3fe1151). The rule is: each 2x2 corner quadrant has one hidden `7`, and that cell is restored so all four quadrants share the same color histogram; equivalently, each non-7 input count is rounded up to a multiple of 4, then divided by 4 to get the per-quadrant quota. The generator matches the family by explicitly sampling that latent quadrant histogram on the fixed 5x5 central-`7` cross, with one hidden cell per quadrant and randomized local permutations. No new primitive was needed.

I discarded the Opus hint and documented why in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e3fe1151/notes.md): it incorrectly predicts global equalization, which fails on the third official training example. The task package files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e3fe1151/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e3fe1151/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e3fe1151/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e3fe1151/notes.md).

Verification passed: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`. Artifacts are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e3fe1151/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e3fe1151/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e3fe1151/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e3fe1151/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e3fe1151/previews/preview_03.png). I also visually checked [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e3fe1151/previews/preview_01.png) against [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e3fe1151/previews/originals.png).
